records.question: Which template types described as Book have version 2 templates that started on or before 1979-12-24 10:28:16 and ended exactly on 2000-10-22 11:57:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Book' AND templates.date_effective_from <= '1979-12-24 10:28:16' AND templates.date_effective_to = '2000-10-22 11:57:12' AND templates.version_number = 2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ref_template_types.template_type_code
FROM Ref_Template_Types ref_template_types
JOIN Templates ON ref_template_types.Template_Type_Code = Templates.Template_Type_Code
WHERE ref_template_types.Template_Type_Description = 'Book'
AND Templates.Version_Number = 2
AND Templates.Date_Effective_From <= '1979-12-24 10:28:16'
AND Templates.Date_Effective_To = '2000-10-22 11:57:12'
